data.content: Plan approved. The proposed split is feasible and aligned with the current code seams: a dedicated Loom compat harness, thin CLI plumbing, and targeted runtime changes to consume bundle-defined failure targets instead of only . Test coverage is appropriately scoped to include harness helpers, CLI/integration coverage for install/use/persisted workflow_id/prompt sourcing/happy and failure transitions/cleanup, and Loom-gated live coverage for the real CLI boundary. No invariant conflicts found; main watchpoints remain explicit diagnostics for missing or mismatched Loom/bundle schemas and deterministic restoration of repo-local workflow selection and installed artifacts.
